allow: Bash(node -e "const fs = require\('fs'\); const d = JSON.parse\(fs.readFileSync\('public/imperial-guard_faction.json', 'utf8'\)\); const eng = d.units.find\(function\(u\) { return u.name && u.name.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('engineer'\); }\); const rat = d.units.find\(function\(u\) { return u.name && u.name.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('ratling'\); }\); console.log\('Engineering:', JSON.stringify\(eng, null, 2\).slice\(0, 400\)\); console.log\('Ratling:', JSON.stringify\(rat, null, 2\).slice\(0, 400\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const fs = require\('fs'\); const d = JSON.parse\(fs.readFileSync\('public/imperial-guard_faction.json', 'utf8'\)\); const eng = d.units.find\(function\(u\) { return u.id === 'engineer-platoon'; }\); const rat = d.units.find\(function\(u\) { return u.id === 'ratling-platoon'; }\); console.log\('ENGINEER PLATOON:'\); console.log\(JSON.stringify\(eng, null, 2\)\); console.log\('RATLING PLATOON:'\); console.log\(JSON.stringify\(rat, null, 2\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const fs = require\('fs'\); const raw = fs.readFileSync\('public/imperial-guard/10-units-elite.json', 'utf8'\); const d = JSON.parse\(raw\); const ids = d.units.map\(function\(u\){return u.id;}\); console.log\('Elite units:', ids\);")

Bash(node -e "const fs = require\('fs'\); const raw = fs.readFileSync\('public/imperial-guard/10-units-elite.json', 'utf8'\); const lines = raw.split\('\\n'\); lines.forEach\(function\(l,i\){if\(l.includes\('engineer-platoon'\)||l.includes\('ratling-platoon'\)\){console.log\(i+1, l\);}}\);")

Bash(node -e "const fs = require\('fs'\); const d = JSON.parse\(fs.readFileSync\('public/imperial-guard_faction.json', 'utf8'\)\); const platoons = d.units.filter\(function\(u\){return u.platoon;}\); console.log\('Platoon units:', platoons.map\(function\(u\){return u.id + ' \(' + \(u.platoonUnits||[]\).length + ' sub-units\)';}\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\); const d=JSON.parse\(fs.readFileSync\('public/space-marines_faction.json','utf8'\)\); console.log\('Root keys:', Object.keys\(d\)\); console.log\('Unit count:', d.units?.length\); console.log\('First unit keys:', Object.keys\(d.units?.[0]||{}\)\); console.log\('First model keys:', Object.keys\(d.units?.[0]?.models?.[0]||{}\)\); console.log\('Statline sample:', JSON.stringify\(d.units?.[0]?.models?.[0]?.statline\)\); console.log\('First option type:', d.units?.[0]?.options?.[0]?.type\); console.log\('Option types used:', [...new Set\(\(d.units||[]\).flatMap\(u=>u.options||[]\).map\(o=>o.type\)\)]\);")

Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\); const d=JSON.parse\(fs.readFileSync\('public/orks_faction.json','utf8'\)\); console.log\('Root keys:', Object.keys\(d\)\); console.log\('Statline types:', [...new Set\(\(d.units||[]\).flatMap\(u=>u.models||[]\).map\(m=>m.statline?.type\)\)]\); console.log\('Option types:', [...new Set\(\(d.units||[]\).flatMap\(u=>u.options||[]\).map\(o=>o.type\)\)]\); const sampleVehicleModel=\(d.units||[]\).flatMap\(u=>u.models||[]\).find\(m=>m.statline?.FA\); if\(sampleVehicleModel\) console.log\('Vehicle statline:', JSON.stringify\(sampleVehicleModel.statline\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\); const pkg=JSON.parse\(fs.readFileSync\('package.json','utf8'\)\); console.log\('AJV version:', pkg.dependencies?.ajv||pkg.devDependencies?.ajv\); console.log\('All deps:', JSON.stringify\({...pkg.dependencies,...pkg.devDependencies},null,2\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\); const d=JSON.parse\(fs.readFileSync\('public/space-marines_faction.json','utf8'\)\); const vehModel=\(d.units||[]\).flatMap\(u=>u.models||[]\).find\(m=>m.statline?.FA\); console.log\('Vehicle statline:', JSON.stringify\(vehModel?.statline\)\); const allSvTypes=[...new Set\(\(d.units||[]\).flatMap\(u=>u.models||[]\).map\(m=>typeof m.statline?.Sv\)\)]; console.log\('Sv types in SM:', allSvTypes\); const opts=\(d.units||[]\).flatMap\(u=>u.options||[]\); console.log\('Toggle keys sample:', JSON.stringify\(Object.keys\(opts.find\(o=>o.type==='toggle'\)||{}\)\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\); const d=JSON.parse\(fs.readFileSync\('public/orks_faction.json','utf8'\)\); const strSvModels=\(d.units||[]\).flatMap\(u=>u.models||[]\).filter\(m=>typeof m.statline?.Sv==='string'\).map\(m=>\({unit:'?',model:m.id,Sv:m.statline.Sv}\)\); console.log\('String Sv in Orks:', JSON.stringify\(strSvModels.slice\(0,5\)\)\); const allStatKeys=[...new Set\(\(d.units||[]\).flatMap\(u=>u.models||[]\).flatMap\(m=>Object.keys\(m.statline||{}\)\)\)]; console.log\('All stat keys:', allStatKeys\);")
